segments.text: If they finish the KO from here it'll be even, but
segments.original_text: このまま撃墜しきればイーブになるが

segments.original_text: へろー選手の復帰ルートうまい

full_text: Down throw into nair If they finish the KO from here it'll be even, but Hello player's recovery route is nice Could be read as either inside or off-stage That kind of recovery route Hard to punish

corrections.original: 下投げから空中白攻撃
ヘロー選手の復帰ルートうまい
